items.title: Legacy Alpha-Delta immutable raw captures
items.required_artifact_or_action: Maintain the closed selected-scope recovery baseline: Aephia 64/64, HNN 157/157, and Official 320/320; five Herald pilot captures remain preserved separately.

items.title: Intergalactic Herald raw recovery
items.required_artifact_or_action: Retain the frozen 259-record inventory and five preserved pilot captures; do not recover the remaining 254 records unless the operator reopens this source family.

items.title: Additional Star Atlas Discord channels
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide privacy-reviewed native exports for Atlas Amphitheater, Atlas Brew Lounge, DAO announcements, economics, faction, Foundation Room, general, governance, guild, and support channels.

items.title: Recurring official-source freshness
items.required_artifact_or_action: Run read-only discovery checks for newsroom, support, governance, Medium, X, Discord, and official GitHub surfaces; create queues only.

items.title: Historical normalized URL dispositions
items.required_artifact_or_action: Retain the immutable inventory and refresh the deterministic overlay when a relevant campaign closes.

items.title: Atlas Brew URLs and dates
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide or discover an authoritative 123-episode mapping of video ID, URL, and publication date; speaker mapping remains optional.

items.title: Town Hall/DAO/Economic Forum URLs and dates
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide program inventories or source URLs for all 36 supplied transcripts.

items.title: Complete official broadcast inventories
items.required_artifact_or_action: Build bounded episode inventories for Town Halls, DAO discussions, Economic Forums, and other official broadcast programs.

items.title: HNN transcript URLs and dates
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide an 85-source episode map or authoritative channel inventory.

items.title: HNN transcript significance evaluation
items.required_artifact_or_action: Run the approved context-sensitive transcript policy against the preserved normalized corpus.

items.title: Medium publication discovery
items.required_artifact_or_action: Revisit 51 explicitly deferred candidates and run current publication-native discovery without changing the 173-item confirmed-corpus boundary.

items.title: Original PIP-33 vote export
items.required_artifact_or_action: Retain the checksum-identical PIP-33 member preserved inside the later DAO PIP vote ZIP.

items.title: PIP-33 provenance sidecar predates raw preservation
items.required_artifact_or_action: Correct the per-PIP provenance sidecar in a manifest-aware campaign without rewriting vote evidence.

items.title: Treasury/payment/execution evidence
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide scoped Solana transaction, account, program, and slot data before any on-chain verification claim.

items.title: Unmerged economic-report discovery registry
items.required_artifact_or_action: Use the 17-URL branch registry only as a discovery seed for a conforming Phase 2 PDF ingestion campaign, then retire the branch.

items.title: Official X history before 2024-11-05
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide an earlier account export or bounded archive discovery manifest.

items.title: Discord native identifiers
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide privacy-reviewed exports retaining server, channel, message, author IDs, and timezone offsets.

items.title: Fourteen Discord attachment-only placeholders
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide attachment metadata or a corrected export.

items.title: Lore upstream link and mirror reconciliation
items.required_artifact_or_action: Review 252 unresolved links and 86 mirror divergences without rewriting the immutable snapshot.

items.title: Legacy article review queues
items.required_artifact_or_action: Normalize the meaning and disposition of Alpha, Bravo, and Delta campaign review flags.

items.title: Four HNN written retrieval failures
items.required_artifact_or_action: Retry or locate archived snapshots for the documented failed URLs.

items.title: Deleted or moved official pages
items.required_artifact_or_action: Run archive-index discovery and retain live/archive provenance separately.

items.title: PIP implementation evidence
items.required_artifact_or_action: Resolve the seven prioritized governance research items and retain Council reports as attributed evidence.

items.title: Authoritative ship-state version
items.required_artifact_or_action: Provide official document URL/version and marketplace ID mapping when available.

items.title: Community wallet methodology
items.required_artifact_or_action: Identify compiler, method, and date; preserve all ownership claims as community attribution until independently supported.

items.title: Cross-platform generated-artifact line endings
items.required_artifact_or_action: Adopt a scoped line-ending policy for deterministic generated lore artifacts without bulk-renormalizing preserved evidence.
